name: holacracy
description: Engage with Holacracy from inside Claude — actor- and role-aware AI co-pilots for the four Core Roles (Facilitator, Secretary, Lead Link, Rep Link), a governance-aware operating frame, proactive cross-role tension capture (subagent + slash commands for capture, inbox review, and end-of-session supersession sweep) built on the durable role-backlog filing primitive, and a conditional SessionStart briefing for scheduled role routines. Pairs with the GlassFrog MCP connector.
